ddls:
CREATE TABLE "parking_bays" (
  "bay_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parking bay */,
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parking zone the bay belongs to */,
  "st_marker_id" TEXT /* Street marker ID for the bay */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the bay (e.g., Unoccupied, Present) */,
  "lat" REAL /* Latitude of the bay */,
  "lon" REAL /* Longitude of the bay */,
  "max_height" REAL /* Maximum height of vehicles that can park in the bay */,
  "max_weight" REAL /* Maximum weight of vehicles that can park in the bay */,
  "bay_type" TEXT /* Type of the parking bay (e.g., compact, standard, accessible) */,
  "is_disabled" INTEGER /* Indicates if the bay is currently disabled */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the bay's status was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bay_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parking_bays_zone_id FOREIGN KEY ("zone_id") REFERENCES parking_zones ("zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parking_zones" (
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parking zone */,
  "zone_name" TEXT /* Name of the parking zone */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the parking zone */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Total capacity of the parking zone */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the parking zone */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Operating hours of the parking zone */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the parking zone is currently active */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the zone's information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., driver, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user for alerts and communication */,
  "license_plate" TEXT /* License plate number of the user's vehicle */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parking_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parking session */,
  "bay_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parking bay used during the session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who used the parking bay */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the parking session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the parking session */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the parking session */,
  "fee" REAL /* Parking fee for the session */,
  "license_plate" TEXT /* License plate number of the vehicle parked */,
  "is_paid" INTEGER /* Indicates if the parking session has been paid for */,
  "is_pre_booked" INTEGER /* Indicates if the parking session was pre-booked */,
  "booking_time" TEXT /* Time when the parking session was booked (if pre-booked) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parking_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parking_sessions_bay_id FOREIGN KEY ("bay_id") REFERENCES parking_bays ("bay_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parking session for which the payment was made */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, cash) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount paid */,
  "payment_time" TEXT /* Time when the payment was made */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., pending, completed, refunded) */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Transaction ID for tracking purposes */,
  "is_refunded" INTEGER /* Indicates if the payment has been refunded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES parking_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parking_guidance" (
  "guidance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parking guidance information */,
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parking zone for which the guidance is provided */,
  "guidance_type" TEXT /* Type of guidance (e.g., traffic update, parking availability) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message to be displayed */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the guidance information is currently active */,
  "valid_until" TEXT /* Time until the guidance information is valid */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority level of the guidance information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("guidance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parking_guidance_zone_id FOREIGN KEY ("zone_id") REFERENCES parking_zones ("zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic update */,
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parking zone for which the update is provided */,
  "update_time" TEXT /* Time when the update was made */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message to be displayed */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the traffic update is currently active */,
  "valid_until" TEXT /* Time until the traffic update is valid */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority level of the traffic update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_updates_zone_id FOREIGN KEY ("zone_id") REFERENCES parking_zones ("zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics data */,
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parking zone for which the analytics is provided */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Type of metric (e.g., occupancy rate, revenue) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date for which the analytics is provided */,
  "time_period" TEXT /* Time period for which the analytics data is provided (e.g., hourly, daily, weekly) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the analytics data (e.g., sensor data, user data) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_zone_id FOREIGN KEY ("zone_id") REFERENCES parking_zones ("zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user to whom the alert was sent */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., parking availability, traffic update) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message to be displayed */,
  "sent_time" TEXT /* Time when the alert was sent */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Indicates if the alert has been read by the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the alert is currently active */,
  "valid_until" TEXT /* Time until the alert is valid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_data" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "bay_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parking bay for which the sensor data is provided */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., occupancy sensor, traffic sensor) */,
  "reading" REAL /* Reading from the sensor */,
  "reading_time" TEXT /* Time when the reading was taken */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the sensor is currently active */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the sensor data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_bay_id FOREIGN KEY ("bay_id") REFERENCES parking_bays ("bay_id")
)
